subject: Implementation of Get Trust Level Interface
commit_message:
Implementation of Get Trust Level Interface

- This commit includes a cherry pick commit:
  Change untrustworthyCmHandleSet with trustLevelPerCmHandleMap
- Change Device heartbet consumer accordingly
- Add schema for device trust level
- Add hazelcast config for trustLevelPerCmHandleMap
- Add with_trust_level enum into cm handle query conditions
- Add query cm handle by trustlevel function to cm handle
  queries
- Add query cm handle by trustlevel service to network cm proxy cm
  handle service
- Add unit tests and fix code smells

Issue-ID: CPS-1864
Change-Id: I2371916adad1f396f1babc7ba1225a09b0e7a54e
Signed-off-by: halil.cakal <halil.cakal@est.tech>
